author: s1na
content: Good summary. There is a lot we can achieve by just going down the list of methods that have already been implemented in most clients and specifying/adding tests for them. E.g. eth_config was proposed as an EIP https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910.  There is a PR for it https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/678. I believe most clients already agree even on details. Re tracing methods Chase is adding them: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/762.

author: s1na
content:
And this inspired me to take a look at eth_subscribe again. I've attempted to specify it before (https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/issues/496). But the issue is OpenRPC doesn't allow me to express constraint between the parameters. However, there is a way to specify it more loosely, at the expense of some validation/readability loss:
- Take first parameter as an enum (newHead, pending txes, etc.) and second parameter oneOf on the possible parameters for all of those events. It means technically the specification could mix and match.

author: mysticryuujin
content: I suspect that the original author of https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/678 is probably not going to update their PR with rpctestgen tests, so maybe we should copy it to a new PR?

author: mysticryuujin
content: Or a maintainer needs to force push 😅

author: boma_naps
content: Makes sense walking the list of already-shipping methods, and also #762 is close to landing as most clients already commented. On eth_subscribe, the enum-plus-oneOf workaround sounds fine losing tight param-relationship validation is a reasonable tradeoff to actually have it specified.

author: boma_naps
content: He has but with this comment https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/678#issuecomment-4398599938  I sort agree with him though

author: mysticryuujin
content: They merged main but they didn't generate tests via rpctestgen, which is the current blocker, so point stands, we need a new PR or a maintainer needs to force push a patch for rpctestgen

author: boma_naps
content: I dropped a reply let's see
